feat: complete Phase Delta (The Arena) implementation and infrastructure hardening
feat: implement Phase Delta (The Arena) and related hardening

feat(delta): Phase Delta — The Arena social dynamics and dispute resolution

- pHash dedup pipeline: PHashService wired into proof upload, 003_proof_hashes.sql
- Dispute resolution: full DisputeService (UPHELD/OVERTURNED/ESCALATED), 004_disputes.sql
- AdminController: 9 endpoints — dispute queue/detail/resolve, user profile, integrity adjust
- FeedController: REST GET /feed + SSE /feed/stream with anonymized events
- Tavern Board: tier badges (Diamond/Gold/Silver/Bronze), Fury of Week spotlight
- Mobile TavernFeed: SSE activity feed with type icons and connection indicator
- Gatekeeper scan: scripts/gatekeeper-scan.sh for forbidden terminology detection
- R2StorageService.downloadFile() for server-side media retrieval
- CHANGELOG v0.3.0 (Gamma) and v0.4.0 (Delta), roadmap updated

feat(gamma): Phase Gamma — Panopticon adversarial verification network

- ProofsModule with 3-endpoint upload pipeline (upload-url, confirm-upload, get-detail)
- R2StorageService wired into FuryModule for signed view URLs
- HoneypotService with cron injection every 6h and ±5 integrity grading
- FuryController enhanced with signed R2 URLs in assignment responses
- Fury Workbench: video/image player, confidence slider, flag option, honeypot feedback
- ProofCaptureScreen: live-only camera, tamper-evident watermark, direct R2 upload
- R2 lifecycle rules: 30-day proof expiry, 7-day honeypot cleanup
feat: E2G hardening — BannedUserGuard, GoalEthicsService, FuryRouterWorker, data retention policy, ledger read-path, Stripe prod guard
chore: save local progress
chore: finalize Delta and Omega phase implementations
feat(contracts): implement No-Contact pivot for B2C MVP
